title: A Short Hymn To Lar.
content:
Though I cannot give thee fires
    Glittering to my free desires;
    These accept, and I'll be free,
    Offering poppy unto thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Short Hymn To Lar."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
